description: Celebrate traditional style with this chanderi dupatta from fabindia. The stylish stitch detailing and mix of colours makes this a must buy, sitting firm on your shoulder it'll add an ethnic zing to your outfit. Chanderi fabric is renowned for its very fine gossamer quality, placement of motifs and design intricacy, and has been the chosen fabric for saris produced for the royalty. The fabric's unique qualities result from the traditional method of sizing and hand weaving developed over the centuries. Wear this special piece over kurtas, leggings and heeled sandals.Approximate Length: 250 cmPink chanderi print dupatta made of silk and cotton blended fabricStitched hemsWash careDry clean only
